'''sasozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headfooter|headfooter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headfooter|headfooter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sasozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæsezheth|sæsezheth]] || [[word:sæsezhej|sæsezhej]] || [[word:sæsezhesh|sæsezhesh]] || [[word:sæsezhe|sæsezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sasosozhoth|sasosozhoth]] || [[word:sasosozhoj|sasosozhoj]] || [[word:sasosozhosh|sasosozhosh]] || [[word:sasosozho|sasosozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sasozhoth|sasozhoth]] || [[word:sasozhoj|sasozhoj]] || [[word:sasozhosh|sasozhosh]] || [[word:sasozho|sasozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sasofzhoth|sasofzhoth]] || [[word:sasofzhoj|sasofzhoj]] || [[word:sasofzhosh|sasofzhosh]] || [[word:sasofzhof|sasofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sasozhotho|sasozhotho]] || [[word:sasozhojo|sasozhojo]] || [[word:sasozhosho|sasozhosho]] || [[word:sasozhoko|sasozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sasozhoth|sasozhoth]] || [[word:sasozhoj|sasozhoj]] || [[word:sasozhosh|sasozhosh]] || [[word:sasozho|sasozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sasozhothol|sasozhothol]] || [[word:sasozhojol|sasozhojol]] || [[word:sasozhoshol|sasozhoshol]] || [[word:sasozhokol|sasozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sasozhothotho|sasozhothotho]] || [[word:sasozhojojo|sasozhojojo]] || [[word:sasozhoshosho|sasozhoshosho]] || [[word:sasozhoko|sasozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sasozhothon|sasozhothon]] || [[word:sasozhojon|sasozhojon]] || [[word:sasozhoshon|sasozhoshon]] || [[word:sasozhokon|sasozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sasozhothoro|sasozhothoro]] || [[word:sasozhojoro|sasozhojoro]] || [[word:sasozhoshoro|sasozhoshoro]] || [[word:sasozhokoro|sasozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
